title: aspidoglossum eylesii
intro: Aspidoglossum eylesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the eyles' aspidoglossum. This plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The root of the Aspidoglossum eylesii plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of the mentioned health conditions.
